hooks.command: f=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); echo "$f" | grep -qE '^(pipeline|dashboard)/' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PostToolUse", "additionalContext": "Pipeline/dashboard file changed. If behavior changed, update BOOK_PROCESS.md and BACKLOG.md."}}' || true
echo '{"systemMessage": "Docs check: update BACKLOG.md + tasks/lessons.md if project state changed."}'
